subcodes.first_line: In this day the Sun of Truth hath dawned and risen from the horizon of the heaven of Divine Will, and the Most Great comprehensive Word hath emerged from the [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز آفتاب حقیقت از افق سماء اراده الهی مشرق و طالع و کلمه جامعه علیا از ام
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
